name: safehire_lead_gen_agency
description: Build and deploy sophisticated 'Office of Agents' on top of SafeHire for active, high-conversion lead generation. Complex adaptive organic workflows: analyze target areas (e.g., Austin metro for home improvement), determine best-suited zones for desired leads, then run consistent ever-evolving agency of highly empathic sales agents (Grok-powered, Dragonscale temporal/collective memory) that generate leads almost always converting to clients. Ties to SafeHire credits/escrow (monetization), claims tools, grokzilla hub, TaskMaster orchestration, codespace-vibe-coder for collab. Use no-proof-deployer for prod release. Real executable only, verified via check-work + runs. Priorities: datacenter-adjacent infra, contractor app release, claims symbiosis.

steps.description: Build adaptive organic workflow (Dragonscale temporal fabric + graph) to analyze target areas (e.g., zip codes, cities like Austin). Score suitability for desired leads (home_improvement, interior_design, design_planning) based on demand signals (from data/Supabase leads history, public trends via MCPs), competition (current leads in SafeHire), demographics, conversion potential. Output ranked list of best areas. Ever-evolving: log outcomes to ledger for learning.

Launch consistent ever-evolving agency of highly empathic sales agents (Grok prompts for empathy, qualification, follow-up; Dragonscale collective intelligence + temporal context for organic adaptation based on past interactions/outcomes). Agents analyze areas from step 1, generate/acquire high-quality leads (e.g., via simulated outreach or integrated data), qualify (budget, timeline, fit), handoff to SafeHire (POST /api/leads with AI-enhanced JSON, credit logic). Aim for near-100% conversion to clients via escrow. Adaptive: update agent 'personalities'/prompts/memory from redemption/escrow success rates.

Enhance SafeHire for agent-driven leads: add real Stripe for credit purchases (replace mocks), API endpoint for agent ingestion (bypass customer post if high-quality), track conversions. Prep and deploy to prod via no-proof-deployer (Godaddy domain, Vercel, fees). Use codespace-vibe-coder for collaborative building of workflows/agents. Symbiosis: leads -> credits -> escrow -> claims if needed.

Centralize 'Office of Agents' in grokzilla-hub (add /agents dashboard for monitoring swarms, workflows, conversion metrics). Integrate Dragonscale ledger for persistent evolving memory across agents. Use TaskMaster for orchestration (high-level TASKs spawn sub-workflows). Ever-adaptive: feedback from SafeHire (redemptions, completed projects) updates agents via temporal fabric.

Track everything in Linear (initiatives for agency phases). Generate docs/pitches with grok_com_gamma. Verify high conversion (test workflows end-to-end, check SafeHire leads -> escrow success; check-work loops; podman runs). Use codespace-vibe-coder for ongoing collab on refinements. Deploy updates via no-proof. Goal: organic, adaptive system generating leads that almost always convert, feeding SafeHire revenue (credits, 5-30% fees).

symbiotic_protocol: Dragonscale (agents/temporal/ledger for organic evolving) + TaskMaster (orchestrate complex workflows) + Grokzilla (hub/monitoring) + SafeHire (platform for leads->escrow) + no-proof-deployer (prod release) + codespace-vibe-coder (collab building) + MCPs (github/linear/vercel/godaddy/gamma for data/deploys/tracking). Workflows analyze -> target -> empathic generate -> handoff -> learn -> evolve. Minimal input: target_region. Real only, verified execution.
